---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement / 提出功能建议
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
  Thank you for your suggestion!
  感谢你的建议！请尽量填写以下信息。
-->

## Is your feature request related to a problem? / 这个需求源于某个痛点吗？

<!-- A clear description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when ..." -->
<!-- 清楚描述痛点。例如："每次……都很麻烦……" -->

## Describe the solution you'd like / 你希望的解决方案

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->
<!-- 简洁清楚地描述你希望实现的功能。 -->

## Describe alternatives you've considered / 你考虑过的替代方案

<!-- Any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->
<!-- 你考虑过哪些替代方案？ -->

## Example usage / 使用示例

<!-- If applicable, show how the new feature would be used from the CLI. -->
<!-- 如果适用，展示新功能的命令行使用方式。 -->

```bash
skillsync <your-new-command> --some-flag
```

## Additional context / 补充说明

<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or references here. -->
<!-- 其他上下文、截图或参考资料。 -->
